results.title: Peace in action
results.creator_credit: Jeff Spencer and Victoria. Ministry of Education
results.brief_description: Peace is everyone’s responsibility. The peace program views peace issues being developed and taught in schools. Examples from primary and postprimary schools include art, student initiatives, plays, student councils and community interest. Professor Charlesworth raises issues for further discussion in schools

results.title: Computers in accounting
results.creator_credit: Jeff Spencer, George Cass and Victoria. Ministry of Education
results.brief_description: Shows some of the ways in which computer technology is being used in accounting firms and examines the impact of this on small business. Some of the problems encountered by small business when installing a new computer system are discussed. Also looks at the training needed by young people seeking employment in the accounting profession.
results.creator_credit_for_label: Jeff Spencer, George Cass and Victoria. Ministry of Education

results.title: A Step in the right direction
results.creator_credit: Eric Kenning and Department of Foreign Affairs
results.brief_description: A review of the International Year of Peace, looking at a number of projects undertaken - projects that raised public awareness of peace issues, disarmament and arms control.

results.title: East meets West
results.brief_description: West is a theatre company made up of actors, musicians and directors. In this program, the members of the company are working together with a Melbourne Vietnamese community and have devised a play which is intended as a welcome to Vietnamese immigrants in Australia. Scenes from rehearsals and excerpts from the performances are included.

results.title: Scooter girl
results.creator_credit: Melissa McLachlan, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI
results.brief_description: Melissa McLachlan considers the advantages of having a scooter to get to work and the social benefits. The scooter is much more than a mode of transport for McLachlan.

results.title: Remembering
results.creator_credit: Laura Brearley, ACMI Digital Storytelling and ACMI
results.brief_description: When Laura Brearley’s dear friend died of cancer, Brearley took solace in her art, her music and remembering. In doing this, Brearley gave the gift of comfort to many others.
